doctrine_population_status.authority_boundary: standard binds public route-plane capsule, mechanism, source-module manifest, receipts, and lattice evidence only; it does not upgrade browse rows to live source authority or certify live route freshness
doctrine_population_status.reentry_condition: refresh this standard when the capsule subject edges, mechanism source row, source-module manifest, copied source digest floor, route-plane receipt floor, or authority ceiling changes

validation_rules: require public route rows to remain projections and not control-entry authority
require route-source coupling digests, route counts, and copied source-module digests to match declared values
require copied source modules to carry exact source-to-target digest matches and required anchor checks
reject banned first-contact routes, stale source claims, missing omission receipts, private body leaks, duplicate route ids, dropped entry floors, and affordance anti-trigger bypasses

reject source authority upgrades, live macro kernel authority, provider calls, account/session state export, browser/HUD live access, recipient work, publication, release, and whole-system correctness claims
require secret-exclusion scanning over route bundle files and copied source modules with body text omitted from receipts
receipt_expectations: receipt must cite route row count, source coupling, route lease, entry admission, affordance selection, code architecture packet, source module digest/anchor status, secret-exclusion scan, authority ceiling, and anti-claim

allowed_public_inputs: exact copied non-secret macro navigation source modules
source refs, hashes, and anchor checks
synthetic negative cases around public route behavior

standard_payload.ontology: A public-safe navigation control-plane organ that validates route projections, route leases, entry-payload floors, affordance selection, omission boundaries, and exact copied non-secret source modules without treating projections as live source authority.
standard_payload.teleology: Give a cold reader the real route/control-plane body needed to inspect how Microcosm decides first-contact navigation while preserving the boundary between public runtime evidence and live macro authority.
standard_payload.anti_purpose: A card-only route index, a stale source pointer, or a route receipt that passes while copied source modules are missing, stale, or leaking private/session payloads.
failure_modes: route projection row treated as control-entry authority
banned first-contact route accepted without replacement
source coupling digest stale or overclaimed as current
route card missing omission receipt for compacted authority
route card exports private body material or matched excerpts
duplicate route identifiers collapse route selection
entry payload drops non-negotiable control fields
affordance passport anti-trigger ignored during route selection
copied source module missing from public bundle
copied source module digest does not match macro source digest
copied source module lacks required navigation/control anchor
receipt duplicates full source body instead of refs, hashes, and verdicts
provider payload, browser/HUD live-access, account/session, credential, or recipient-send state exported
public route-plane pass claimed as release, source mutation, whole-system correctness, or live macro-kernel authority

contract_projection_basis.authority_boundary: computed standard-lattice contract only; accepted organ registry and receipt anchors bound the source row but do not grant release, provider dispatch, private-root equivalence, or whole-system correctness authority.

anti_claim: This standard governs a public route-plane runtime and exact copied non-secret navigation source bodies. It does not authorize live macro-kernel execution, source mutation, provider calls, browser/HUD access, account/session export, recipient work, publication, release, private-root equivalence, or whole-system correctness.

author.purpose: create a valid Navigation hologram route plane instance

refine_instance.purpose: improve an existing Navigation hologram route plane without corrupting authority

refine_standard_and_propagate.purpose: change std_microcosm_navigation_hologram_route_plane and propagate through governed artifacts plus generated lattice projections
